name: IPRoyal
description: IPRoyal Residential Proxy API v1 for account traffic, locations, generated proxy lists, orders, subscriptions, sub-users, IP allowlists, and usage reports. Purchase and subscription tools can spend funds or alter recurring billing.

credential_fields.name: api_token
credential_fields.label: API token
credential_fields.description: IPRoyal API token from Dashboard > Settings > API. Some targeting and ordering capabilities require identity verification.

tools.name: get_user
tools.description: Get account information, available residential traffic, and sub-user count.

tools.name: get_entry_nodes
tools.description: List residential proxy entry nodes and supported HTTP/HTTPS/SOCKS5 ports. Prefer geo.iproyal.com unless a regional node is needed.

tools.name: get_countries
tools.description: Get available countries with nested states, cities, ISPs, and the prefixes required in generated proxy usernames.

tools.name: get_regions
tools.description: Get region targeting values and prefixes.

tools.name: get_country_sets
tools.description: Get provider-defined country sets and their location codes.

tools.name: generate_proxy_list
tools.description: Generate ready-to-use proxy strings. Obtain valid hostname/ports and location prefixes from access tools; use subuser_hash to generate credentials scoped to a sub-user.

tools.name: list_orders
tools.description: List residential traffic orders with pagination.

tools.name: calculate_order_pricing
tools.description: Calculate the current price before buying residential traffic. This does not place an order.

tools.name: create_order
tools.description: Buy residential traffic. This spends account funds and may start a recurring subscription when order_billing_type=subscription. Calculate pricing first and do not retry blindly.

card_id.description: Card to bill; omit to use account balance.

tools.name: get_subscription
tools.description: Get the active residential subscription, amount, next payment date, and payment method.

tools.name: cancel_subscription
tools.description: Cancel the active residential proxy subscription. This is a destructive billing action; fetch the subscription first.

tools.name: change_subscription_payment_method
tools.description: Change the payment method used by the active residential subscription.

tools.name: list_sub_users
tools.description: List residential proxy sub-users, optionally searching usernames.

tools.name: get_sub_user
tools.description: Get one residential proxy sub-user by hash.

tools.name: create_sub_user
tools.description: Create a residential proxy sub-user with credentials, assigned traffic in GB, and optional daily/monthly/lifetime byte limits.

tools.name: update_sub_user
tools.description: Update a residential proxy sub-user's username, password, assigned traffic, or daily/monthly/lifetime limits.

tools.name: delete_sub_user
tools.description: Delete a residential proxy sub-user and invalidate its credentials.

tools.name: give_sub_user_traffic
tools.description: Transfer an amount of traffic in GB from the main account to a sub-user.

tools.name: take_sub_user_traffic
tools.description: Return an amount of traffic in GB from a sub-user to the main account.

tools.name: list_whitelist_entries
tools.description: List IP-authentication entries for a residential user.

tools.name: create_whitelist_entry
tools.description: Authorize an IP/port entry for a residential proxy user.

tools.name: delete_whitelist_entry
tools.description: Delete one IP-authentication entry.

tools.name: download_usage_report
tools.description: Download a CSV data-usage report for a date range, optionally scoped to one user hash.
